mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ledger_voucher (ledger_voucher_date, transfer_transaction_group_id, transfer_transaction_type) VALUES
(#{v.ledgerVoucherDate}, #{v.transferTransactionGroupId}, #{v.transferTransactionType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler})

INSERT INTO ledger_entry (amount, ledger_entry_type, ledger_bank_asset_type, ledger_voucher_id) VALUES
(#{e.amount}, #{e.ledgerEntryType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{e.ledgerBankAssetType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{e.ledgerVoucherId})
